title: senecio ombrophyllus
intro: Senecio ombrophyllus, also known as the moss flower or rock rose, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of southern Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as being used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Senecio ombrophyllus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
